summary: Comprehensive testing of Aqbobek ACS - AI-dispatcher dashboard for Kazakh school. All 29 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing completed successfully with all major flows working.

issues: Modal submit button 'Создать' conflicts with header create button - both have same text. Consider adding unique data-testid to modal submit button for better testability

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for main interactive elements
API endpoints properly validate auth and role permissions (director vs teacher)
Schedule conflict detection working correctly (409 on duplicate teacher/room/time)
AI integrations (Groq) working - voice parse, orders simplify, schedule generator all functional
seed_data_creation: Database pre-seeded with 44 employees (real teachers from Aqbobek school), 13 incidents, 58 schedule lessons (7A/7B), 54 messages from Telegram bot
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend pages tested: Login, Dashboard (KPIs + heatmap), Incidents (kanban), Tasks, Employees (44 rows with telegram badges), Schedule (grid with filter by class), Orders (RAG AI). Teacher login redirects to /cabinet with personal schedule and tasks. Logout clears token and redirects to /login. AI integrations (Groq) are real and working - tested voice parse, orders simplify, schedule generator, and substitute finder.

auth.director_login: PASS - returns JWT + user with user_role=director
auth.teacher_login: PASS - returns JWT + user with user_role=teacher
auth.auth_me: PASS - returns user info with Bearer token

dashboard.stats: PASS - returns employees, incidents_open, tasks_open, canteen_today, substitutions_today, messages_week, incidents_recent
dashboard.heatmap: PASS - returns days (Mon-Fri) and rows with teacher load distribution

employees.list: PASS - returns 44 employees with full_name, role, subject, email, telegram_id

tasks.list: PASS - director sees all, teacher sees own

ai_features.schedule_generator: PASS - greedy algorithm returns schedule + conflicts
ai_features.voice_parse: PASS - parses text to tasks via Groq

frontend_pages.dashboard: PASS - KPIs, heatmap, recent incidents visible
frontend_pages.schedule: PASS - grid with filter, AI buttons
frontend_pages.logout: PASS - clears token, redirects to login
